issues.description: AttachDon action is incorrect. Card text says 'Give up to 3 rested DON!! cards' which means the Leader must already have rested DON cards available to give/transfer. AttachDon implies adding DON from outside. Should be clarified or use a different action. Additionally, the condition 'to your {Land of Wano} type Leader' is not represented in the DSL—there should be a LeaderHasType condition.
Missing condition: LeaderHasType with type '{Land of Wano}'. The effect only applies if Leader has this type.

ForceDiscard without target specification. Text says 'from the top of your opponent's Life cards', which is a specific source (opponent's life deck), not a standard hand discard. Current DSL is ambiguous about source.
